sources.title: Bantam King official homepage
sources.excerpt: Current homepage menu enumeration is the strongest current food/nonalcoholic catalog anchor.
Official menu page lists the substantive menu and linked PDF.

sources.title: Bantam King official menus
sources.excerpt: Current HTML enumerates ramen, toppings, chicken, sides, dessert, non-alcoholic drinks, and soft drinks; its descriptions explicitly name several ingredients.

sources.excerpt: Reachable ordering surface, but complete enumeration unavailable.
